 Job Description
 
**Role Purpose** 




 The purpose of this role is to design, test and maintain software programs for operating systems or applications which needs to be deployed at a client end and ensure its meet 100% quality assurance parameters
 


 ͏
 
**Do** 




 1\\. Instrumental in understanding the requirements and design of the product/ software
 


* Develop software solutions by studying information needs, studying systems flow, data usage and work processes
* Investigating problem areas followed by the software development life cycle
* Facilitate root cause analysis of the system issues and problem statement
* Identify ideas to improve system performance and impact availability
* Analyze client requirements and convert requirements to feasible design
* Collaborate with functional teams or systems analysts who carry out the detailed investigation into software requirements
* Conferring with project managers to obtain information on software capabilities


 ͏

* Determine operational feasibility by evaluating analysis, problem definition, requirements, software development and proposed software
* Develop and automate processes for software validation by setting up and designing test cases/scenarios/usage cases, and executing these cases
* Modifying software to fix errors, adapt it to new hardware, improve its performance, or upgrade interfaces.
* Analyzing information to recommend and plan the installation of new systems or modifications of an existing system
* Ensuring that code is error free or has no bugs and test failure
* Preparing reports on programming project specifications, activities and status
* Ensure all the codes are raised as per the norm defined for project / program / account with clear description and replication patterns
* Compile timely, comprehensive and accurate documentation and reports as requested
* Coordinating with the team on daily project status and progress and documenting it
* Providing feedback on usability and serviceability, trace the result to quality risk and report it to concerned stakeholders

* Participating in continuing education and training to remain current on best practices, learn new programming languages, and better assist other team members.

* Document and demonstrate solutions by developing documentation, flowcharts, layouts, diagrams, charts, code comments and clear code
* Documenting very necessary details and reports in a formal way for proper understanding of software from client proposal to implementation
* Ensure good quality of interaction with customer w.r.t. e\\-mail content, fault report tracking, voice calls, business etiquette etc

**No.**

 Experience: 5\\-8 Years

description:
At EY, you’ll have the chance to build a career as unique as you are, with the global scale, support, inclusive culture and technology to become the best version of you. And we’re counting on your unique voice and perspective to help EY become even better, too. Join us and build an exceptional experience for yourself, and a better working world for all.
   

  

**Career Family ServiceNow Platform Support**
**Role Type Technical Lead – Support Analyst**
**The opportunity**
* ServiceNow Platform administrator (Senior)
* Expected joining date Immediate
* Experience: 6 to 8 years’ experience


**Your Key Responsibilities**
* ServiceNow Platform administration and maintenance activities
* ServiceNow vendor coordination.
* Incident Management, Change and Problem Management.
* Major Incident handling and complex troubleshooting.
* Develop clear and concise technical \\& process documentation.
* Understand new ServiceNow features and unused module functionality to drive platform expansion and adoption.
* Service operations and escalated support, assisting in the management of the ServiceNow service, including core configuration, user administration, core application administration and service administration and upgrades.
* Manage the setup, administration and configuration of Field System Support applications and tools.
* Investigate technical solutions and coordinate with support teams to validate accuracy of the online support documentation.


**Skills And Attributes For Success**
* Have experience in ServiceNow L2 and L3 support or in ServiceNow development.
* Strong vendor and relationship management skills
* A strong core production support engineer with a solid background in the UNIX, Windows \\& Java scripting.
* An ‘all\\-rounder’ with experience and knowledge in a variety of technologies including Oracle, MSSQL, Sybase, HTML/CSS, REST
* Strong knowledge of Web 2\\.0 Technologies (Java Scripting, XML, HTML, AJAX, Jelly, CSS, PERL scripting) PowerShell
* Minimum 4\\+ years of JavaScript experience including usage of jQuery, Bootstrap and AngularJS frameworks.
* Minimum 4\\+ years of hands\\-on experience on the below ServiceNow modules (Recommended):


**Must Have:** 
 ITSM, CMDB, Service Portal, CSM, Custom Applications, ServiceNow Family Upgrades, ITIL Foundation
   

  

**Good to have:** 
 HRSD, ITOM, Discovery, IRM, SecOps
   

  

* Appreciation, knowledge and experience of competitive industry standard monitoring technologies and solutions would be advantageous.
* ServiceNow Certified Systems Administrator
* Certified Application Developer Certification
* Have excellent oral and written communication skills (English)
* Be a Self\\-Starter, highly self\\-motivated individual with robust decision\\-making capability.
* Be delivery focused and used to working within tight deadlines and able to identify problems at an early stage.
* Be a 'team player' but also able to work autonomously.
* Possess strong analytical and problem\\-solving abilities.
* Be a structured, methodical thinker with a keen eye for detail.
* Be confident and able to convincingly structure, summaries, present and challenge thoughts, or ideas.
* Be appropriately assertive with excellent relationship building and stakeholder management skills.
* Excellent business communication skills
* Education in Information Technology or equivalent working experience
* Have exposure to working in shifts and on\\-call support.


**To qualify for the role, you must have**
 Strong in following technologies (minimum 5\\+year hands on experience on the below mentioned tech stack).
   

  

* Java, Java Script
* RESTful Webservices
* Angular JS
* HTML, CSS, SOAP, REST
* API handling


**What We Offer**
 EY Global Delivery Services (GDS) is a dynamic and truly global delivery network. We work across six locations – Argentina, China, India, the Philippines, Poland and the UK – and with teams from all EY service lines, geographies and sectors, playing a vital role in the delivery of the EY growth strategy. From accountants to coders to advisory consultants, we offer a wide variety of fulfilling career opportunities that span all business disciplines. In GDS, you will collaborate with EY teams on exciting projects and work with well\\-known brands from across the globe. We’ll introduce you to an ever\\-expanding ecosystem of people, learning, skills and insights that will stay with you throughout your career.
   

  

* Continuous learning: You’ll develop the mindset and skills to navigate whatever comes next.
* Success as defined by you: We’ll provide the tools and flexibility, so you can make a meaningful impact, your way.
* Transformative leadership: We’ll give you the insights, coaching and confidence to be the leader the world needs.
* Diverse and inclusive culture: You’ll be embraced for who you are and empowered to use your voice to help others find theirs.


**EY \\| Building a better working world**
 EY exists to build a better working world, helping to create long\\-term value for clients, people and society and build trust in the capital markets.
   

  

 Enabled by data and technology, diverse EY teams in over 150 countries provide trust through assurance and help clients grow, transform and operate.
   

  

 Working across assurance, consulting, law, strategy, tax and transactions, EY teams ask better questions to find new answers for the complex issues facing our world today.

**Company Overview**
 It is a global leader in the forex trading and fintech sectors, committed to delivering innovative and secure trading solutions to clients worldwide. With a team of over 500 professionals, we drive operational excellence and cutting\\-edge technology.
   

  

**Position Overview**
 We are seeking an experienced Senior QA Engineer to ensure the reliability, performance, and security of our trading platforms and fintech solutions. This role involves designing and executing comprehensive test strategies, including automation, performance, and security testing, while leveraging KPI monitoring and industry\\-standard tools like JMeter and Postman

**Key Responsibilities**
* Test Strategy \\& Planning: Develop and implement robust QA strategies, creating detailed test plans and test cases to ensure thorough coverage of system requirements.
* KPI Monitoring: Implement and monitor key performance indicators to measure system stability, responsiveness, and efficiency.
* API Testing with Postman: Design and execute API test scenarios to validate endpoints, data accuracy, and performance.
* Performance Testing with JMeter: Conduct load, stress, and performance testing to ensure the system meets scalability and reliability benchmarks.
* Security Testing: Perform advanced security testing, including SQL Injection and other vulnerability assessments, to safeguard system integrity and compliance.
* Automation Framework Development: Build and maintain scalable automation frameworks using tools like Selenium, Cypress, or similar technologies.
* Defect Tracking \\& Reporting: Identify, document, and track issues using JIRA, collaborating closely with developers and product teams to resolve them efficiently.
* Regression Testing: Execute regression testing to ensure new releases do not disrupt existing functionalities.
* Collaboration: Partner with cross\\-functional Agile teams, including developers and product managers, to ensure quality is embedded throughout the software development lifecycle.
* Continuous Improvement: Identify areas for improvement in QA processes, tools, and methodologies, and drive initiatives to enhance overall efficiency and effectiveness.


**Required Skills \\& Qualifications**
* 5 \\+ years of experience in software quality assurance, with a focus on automation, performance, and security testing.

* Strong understanding of scripting languages such as Python, JavaScript, or C\\#.

* Experience working with cloud platforms such as AWS or Azure.
* Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines and DevOps practices.
* Knowledge of financial regulations and compliance standards.


**Why Join ?**

* Cutting\\-Edge Tech Stack: Work with modern frameworks and cloud technologies in a dynamic, Agile setting.
* Career Development: Enjoy leadership opportunities, competitive compensation, and a clear growth trajectory.

title: Senior QA Engineer - Automation

title: Tech Lead - Software Engineering
description:
Aqua Security enables enterprises to secure their container\\-based and cloud\\-native applications from development to production, accelerating container adoption and bridging the gap between DevOps and IT security. We are building a state\\-of\\-the\\-art security platform for large enterprises in the exciting and innovative new field of software containers. Our systems are deployed on thousands of customer servers around the world. A distributed system to watch over distributed systems!
 


* We are looking for a talented Expert Engineer to join our server team, in charge of developing Aqua's management console \\- a multi\\-component system with many responsibilities, performing various background jobs and large\\-scale data processing; supplying REST APIs, a web based UI and more.
* In this role, you will take part in further development of our management console, writing features across the entire application stack: SQL queries, business logic, background processes, REST APIs and web\\-based user interfaces.
* At Aqua, you will not be writing code for in\\-house applications. You will be writing code for large technology companies, banks, government agencies and multi\\-national chains.
* Our product is composed of multiple components, mostly installed on\\-premise in our customer's cloud environments, but also has SaaS components, plugins for various CI/CD systems and many more. Almost everything runs inside containers. It is written in Go \\- an exciting new language from Google, and heavily depends on free software/open source components. Our web UI is currently written in VueJS. We are primarily a Linux company, but our software also supports Windows and Mac.



**Working from Aqua Hyderabad office a minimum of 4 days per week (Mon\\-Thu)** 




**Requirements** 



* Track record of delivering various features in large\\-scale applications or core systems with
 **9\\+ years of experience.** 
 .
* Experience writing multi\\-component systems or micro\\-services, with architectures requiring efficient inter\\-application communication.
* Experience writing in a
 **high\\-level language such as Go, Node, Java etc** 
 .. If you're already writing Go \\& Node JS , or spent a weekend debugging the worse memory leak ever, that's a big plus.
* Experience in writing code with vue.js or react.js and typescript.
* Experience
 **writing APIs** 
 (either RESTful or not) and RPCs. If you've broken backwards compatibility for your customers once, and dealt with the fallout, we want you (to deal with the fallout again).
* Experience with RDBMS systems (e.g. MySQL, PostgreSQL, Oracle, SQLite) and/or NoSQL, databases (e.g. MongoDB, Redis, Cassandra, Couchbase). if you know GraphDB, it is a bonus. If you've written queries with more than two joins, or have a strong opinion of why an integer is better as a primary key (or maybe a UUID), we'd like to hear from you.
* Experience with any one of the Cloud providers such as
 **AWS** 
 is a must
* Experience in provisioning infrastructure using IaC tools like Terraform/CloudFormation is a plus
* Experience In cloud Development such as
 **Serverless** 
 \\-
 **Lambda functions** 
 – SNS, SQS, EC2, S3 bucket (Must)
* Linux experience is a must and if you have experience with kafka it is a plus.
* Experience with Docker is must. Kubernetes and OpenShift is a plus. If you can name one way in which a container is different than a regular process, you're golden.



 Aqua Security is the pioneer in cloud native security. Founded in 2015, Aqua Security is a global late\\-stage scale\\-up and the largest pure play cloud native vendor. Aqua helps enterprises see and stop threats across every phase of the software development lifecycle, from dev to cloud and back.
 



 If you’re ready for an exciting opportunity to dive into the hottest cybersecurity category, now is the perfect time to join Aqua! We are a global organization where every Aquarian can make a difference and make a big impact. Aqua also offers great company culture, amazing colleagues, international travel, and lots more!
 



 All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity, national origin, disability or protected veteran status.

 We are seeking a Senior Platform Engineer to help design and develop DataCore Swarm object storage as a production\\-ready appliance for enterprise environments. title: Skm Power Tools Engineer
description:
**Qualification** 




 Bachelor's/Master's degree in Electrical Engineering or equivalent (B.E. / B.Tech / M.Tech).
 



 5\\-15 years of experience in power system studies (Engineer: 5 years / Senior: 5–10 years / DL: 10\\-15\\).
 



 Hands\\-on proficiency in SKM Power Tools is mandatory.
 



 Strong understanding of US electrical standards — NEC, IEEE, NFPA 70E, and utility interconnection requirements.
 



 Experience working on data center, healthcare, or mission\\-critical projects is strongly preferred.
 



  





**Role Description** 




 This is a full\\-time role for an SKM Power Tools Engineer. The SKM Power Tools Engineer will be responsible for performing electrical system modeling, power system analysis, load flow studies, short\\-circuit analyses, and equipment sizing using SKM software. The role also involves preparing detailed technical reports, ensuring adherence to compliance and international standards, coordinating with clients and teams for requirement gathering, and offering technical expertise for project deliverables. Additionally, the engineer will support the development and improvement of processes related to electrical system design and analysis.
 



  





**R\\&R** 




 Perform power system studies using SKM Power Tools including load flow, short circuit, protective device coordination, arc flash, and motor starting analysis.
 



 Develop and validate electrical system models from Single Line Diagrams (SLDs), panel schedules, and equipment data.
 



 Conduct arc flash hazard analysis and generate arc flash labels as per NFPA 70E and NEC requirements.
 



 Perform short circuit calculations as per US project standards.
 



 Prepare protective device coordination curves (TCC) and recommend breaker/fuse settings.
 



 Support generator sizing, UPS system modeling, and emergency power system validation (especially for data centers and healthcare projects).
 



 Coordinate with electrical design engineers to resolve discrepancies between design drawings and analytical models.
 



 Review and validate transformer impedance, cable data, motor parameters, and equipment ratings before modeling.
 



 Prepare detailed study reports including executive summaries, calculation notes, and compliance documentation.
 



 Participate in client technical discussions to explain modeling assumptions, study results, and mitigation strategies.
 



 Support value engineering by recommending optimized breaker sizes, cable sizes, and protective settings.
 



 Perform QA/QC of SKM models developed by junior engineers.
 



 Ensure compliance with US codes including NEC, IEEE, NFPA, and utility standards.
 



 Coordinate with BIM/Revit teams to align modeled electrical systems with analytical models.
 



 Support commissioning and field validation when required (review of relay settings and as\\-built verification).

The result is a sharper focus on business objectives and a dramatic improvement in employee productivity.
